free_text: A self-supporting target, thick 73+-4 mug/cm**2, was
prepared by evaporation in vacuum of enriched metallic
Spectrum of the Si-30(He3,d)P-31 reaction at angle
Three counters located in the focal plane ENGE and
detected deuterons. The first is a 50-cm long position-
sensitive proportional counter. The second one is a
proportional counter acting as a del'ta E detector.
The third counter is a plastic scintillator.
A surface barrier detector was used as a
monitor during the angular distribution measurements.
Orsay MP tandem van de graaff.
The quoted accuracy of the reaction cross
sections values was obtained by combining the errors of
